failure_movement.justification: Previous clusters are null so no delta is measurable. Predicted passrate +0.08–0.18 (to 0.58–0.68); actual is 0.53 (+0.03), below even the falsification threshold. Directional intent (shrink unknown/empty, grow correct) is partially right since unknown=26 and empty=11 are not zero, but magnitude was badly overestimated.

trace_movement.justification: search_mode='bm25+semantic' confirmed in all archival hits (500/500). ** ** highlighting confirmed across all 100 tasks. However, recall tier has zero search_mode metadata, contradicting 'both tiers' claim. No prior token baseline exists, so the flat/+5-10% token claim is plausible but fully unverifiable.

side_effects.justification: Token +5-10% claim is plausible but unverifiable (no prior iter tokens). Predicted 2-4 regressions; no prior iter data to count actual regressions. The prediction's own falsification criterion (passrate delta <0.05) was triggered—actual delta was ~+0.03—suggesting the core mechanism did not fire as expected, which was not flagged as a side-effect risk.
